description: Add task statuses for pending, in progress, and done work.

userStories.title: Adding task status schema
userStories.description: As a product team, I want task records to store status so that tasks can track progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Task records store a status value with default pending.
Existing tasks resolve to pending after the migration or backfill.

userStories.title: Updating task status from backend
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change a task status so that progress updates persist.
acceptanceCriteria: Status updates save pending, in progress, and done values.

userStories.title: Showing task status badges
userStories.description: As a user, I want each task card to show its status so that progress is visible at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Each task card renders the current status as a badge.
Badge text matches the stored task status.
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Changing task status from task list
userStories.description: As a user, I want status controls on the task list so that I can update work without opening details.
acceptanceCriteria: Each task row exposes a status control.
Selecting a new status saves through the backend update action.
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filtering tasks by status
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter the task list by status so that I can focus on one stage of work.
acceptanceCriteria: The task list can filter by pending, in progress, and done.
Filter state updates the visible list contents.
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
